sourcesContent:
<template>
    <el-tabs v-model="editableTabsValue2" type="card" closable @tab-remove="removeTab">
        <el-tab-pane
                v-for="(item, index) in editableTabs2"
                :key="item.name"
                :label="item.title"
                :name="item.name"
        >
            {{item.content}}
        </el-tab-pane>
    </el-tabs>
</template>

<script>
    export default {
        name: "Tabs"
        
    }
</script>

<style scoped>

</style>
